# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Community Contribution CI

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write
  issues: write

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    name: Build and Test PR
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout base repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          path: pr-code

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: pr-code/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        id: install
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm ci 2>&1 | tee install-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run linting
        id: lint
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run lint 2>&1 | tee lint-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run build
        id: build
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee build-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run tests
        id: tests
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm test 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Generate test results summary
        id: summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          EOF=$(dd if=/dev/urandom bs=15 count=1 status=none | base64)
          echo "comment<<$EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          echo "## 🤖 Automated CI Results for PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "**Commit:** \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\`" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "**Author:** @${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "| Step | Status |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "|------|--------|" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          if [ "${{ steps.install.outcome }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "| 📦 Install Dependencies | ✅ Passed |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "| 📦 Install Dependencies | ❌ Failed |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          if [ "${{ steps.lint.outcome }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "| 🔍 Linting | ✅ Passed |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [ "${{ steps.lint.outcome }}" == "skipped" ]; then
            echo "| 🔍 Linting | ⏭️ Skipped |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "| 🔍 Linting | ❌ Failed |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          if [ "${{ steps.build.outcome }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "| 🏗️ Build | ✅ Passed |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [ "${{ steps.build.outcome }}" == "skipped" ]; then
            echo "| 🏗️ Build | ⏭️ Skipped |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "| 🏗️ Build | ❌ Failed |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          if [ "${{ steps.tests.outcome }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "| 🧪 Tests | ✅ Passed |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [ "${{ steps.tests.outcome }}" == "skipped" ]; then
            echo "| 🧪 Tests | ⏭️ Skipped |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "| 🧪 Tests | ❌ Failed |" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          # Add failure details if any step failed
          HAS_FAILURES=false

          if [ "${{ steps.install.outcome }}" == "failure" ]; then
            HAS_FAILURES=true
            echo "<details><summary>📦 Install Dependencies - Error Output</summary>" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            tail -50 pr-code/install-output.txt >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT 2>/dev/null || echo "No output captured" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "</details>" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          if [ "${{ steps.lint.outcome }}" == "failure" ]; then
            HAS_FAILURES=true
            echo "<details><summary>🔍 Linting - Error Output</summary>" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            tail -50 pr-code/lint-output.txt >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT 2>/dev/null || echo "No output captured" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "</details>" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          if [ "${{ steps.build.outcome }}" == "failure" ]; then
            HAS_FAILURES=true
            echo "<details><summary>🏗️ Build - Error Output</summary>" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            tail -50 pr-code/build-output.txt >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT 2>/dev/null || echo "No output captured" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "</details>" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          if [ "${{ steps.tests.outcome }}" == "failure" ]; then
            HAS_FAILURES=true
            echo "<details><summary>🧪 Tests - Error Output</summary>" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            tail -100 pr-code/test-output.txt >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT 2>/dev/null || echo "No output captured" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "</details>" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          if [ "$HAS_FAILURES" == "true" ]; then
            echo "---" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "⚠️ **Some checks failed.** Please review the error output above and update your PR." >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "overall_status=failure" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "---" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "🎉 **All checks passed!** Thank you for your contribution." >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "overall_status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

          echo "" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "*This is an automated comment generated by CI. Last updated: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')*" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          echo "$EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Find existing comment
        id: find-comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/find-comment@v3
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          comment-author: github-actions[bot]
          body-includes: Automated CI Results

      - name: Post or update PR comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@v4
        with:
          comment-id: ${{ steps.find-comment.outputs.comment-id }}
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          body: ${{ steps.summary.outputs.comment }}
          edit-mode: replace

      - name: Set final status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.summary.outputs.overall_status }}" == "failure" ]; then
            echo "One or more CI steps failed"
            exit 1
          fi
